title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bank of India Holdings Services - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bank of India Holdings Services - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the Bank of India Holdings Services family as a Senior Financial Analyst in Bhubaneswar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Bank of India Holdings Services:
Bank of India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of India Holdings Services!
